review_notes: SHEIN 普通属性模板未命中: 源属性 "sku" 当前未找到类目内对应模板字段

The source attribute 'picture_request' with value '1000 px * 1000 px' refers to image dimensions or resolution.
None of the candidate SHEIN display attributes are related to image specifications (e.g., image resolution, picture requirements).
Attributes like '宽度 (cm)' (Width (cm)) and '长度 (cm)' (Length (cm)) refer to the physical dimensions of the product, not its images, and the unit 'px' (pixels) confirms it's an image specification.
